purpose: Machine-checkable acceptance packet for non-broad productization lanes that are allowed to progress without reviving broad Backfill or granting new writer authority.

field_semantics.current_bounded_surface: TRUE means this lane is an existing bounded progress surface that may continue to be tested or documented inside this packet. It is not ProductWriter authority, GUI authority, matrix/workbook authority, or permission to change selected peak, selected area, counted detection, or quant output beyond the already documented contract.
field_semantics.allowed_effect: Describes the bounded effect already allowed by existing lane contracts. It is not a writer predicate and cannot create a new product mutation path.
field_semantics.allowed_scope: Names the narrow existing scope for the lane. Empty scope on blocked or parked rows is intentional and must remain fail-closed.
